hero.subtitle: Frontend architect by day, modular synth builder by night. Creating at the intersection of code and sound from wherever WiFi reaches.

about.p1: I'm Samuel Darío—a software composer who treats code like music: structured yet expressive, technical yet creative. With 5+ years shipping React/TypeScript products and a parallel life building analog synthesizers, I bring a unique perspective to digital experiences.
about.p2: Currently wandering Europe, building from cafés and co-working spaces, proving that great software doesn't need a fixed address.

contact.title: Let's Create Something Together
contact.subtitle:
Whether you need a technical architect, a creative developer,
or someone who speaks both languages fluently.

cv.name: Samuel Darío
cv.title: Frontend Specialist | Electronics Background | Digital Nomad
cv.summary: I build frontend products that actually ship—fast, clean, and pixel-perfect. With 5 years delivering real features in React and TypeScript, I’m the guy teams call when things need to work, not just look pretty. I learn new tech on the fly (Flutter, Node.js, CI/CD, whatever), mock backends when needed, and always ship.
cv.availText: Open to full remote or Europe onsite. Freelance: Yes.
